fields.name: dbId
fields.description: The primary key.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the record was last modified.

fields.name: fromDate
fields.description: The date when the bank account becomes active in the system.

fields.name: toDate
fields.description: The date when the bank account is deactivated or closed.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Internal reference code for the bank account record.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A descriptive label for the bank account.

fields.name: ownerDbId
fields.description: The unique identifier for the account owner.

fields.name: paymentToken
fields.description: A token used for secure payment processing linked to this account.

fields.name: bankAccount
fields.description: The actual bank account number associated with the owner.

fields.name: yearTo
fields.description: The fiscal year until which this account is valid or active.

fields.name: periodTo
fields.description: The fiscal period until which this account is valid or active.

fields.name: isExpensed
fields.description: Indicates whether transactions from this account are marked as expensed.

fields.name: forPayroll
fields.description: Indicates whether this account is used for payroll disbursements.

fields.name: cvv
fields.description: The CVV code if the account is linked to a payment card.

fields.name: bankAccType_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the type of bank account (e.g., checking, savings).

fields.name: bankAccType_code
fields.description: A short code representing the account type.

fields.name: bankAccType_description
fields.description: A descriptive name for the account type.

fields.name: payMethod_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the payment method linked to this account.

fields.name: payMethod_code
fields.description: A short code representing the payment method.

fields.name: payMethod_description
fields.description: A descriptive name for the payment method.

fields.name: paymentCardType_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the payment card type linked to this account.

fields.name: paymentCardType_code
fields.description: A short code representing the payment card type.

fields.name: paymentCardType_description
fields.description: A descriptive name for the payment card type.

fields.name: owner_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the account owner (e.g., company).

fields.name: owner_code
fields.description: A short code representing the account owner.

fields.name: owner_description
fields.description: A descriptive name or details about the account owner.

fields.name: company_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the company linked to the bank account.

fields.name: company_code
fields.description: A short code representing the company associated with the account.

fields.name: company_description
fields.description: The full name or description of the company linked to the account.

fields.name: currency_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the currency used in the bank account.

fields.name: currency_code
fields.description: The currency code (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR') for transactions in this account.

fields.name: currency_description
fields.description: The full name of the currency (e.g., 'US Dollar').

fields.name: billAddress_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the billing address associated with this account.

fields.name: country_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the country where the bank account is registered.

fields.name: country_code
fields.description: The ISO or system code for the country of the bank account.

fields.name: country_description
fields.description: The full name of the country where the bank account is located.

fields.name: bank_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the bank institution.

fields.name: bank_code
fields.description: A short code representing the bank institution.

fields.name: bank_description
fields.description: The full name of the bank institution.

fields.name: bank_bankRouting
fields.description: The bank routing number used for domestic transfers.

fields.name: bank_swift
fields.description: The SWIFT/BIC code for international transfers.

fields.name: bankRecord_dbId
fields.description: The unique database identifier for the bank record.
